title: Iran declares Strait of Hormuz 'completely open'; Trump says U.S. blockade 'will remain in full force' until peace deal
snippet: Iran FM Araghchi announces Hormuz open. Trump responds: thanks Iran but US blockade of Iranian ports 'will remain in full force' until 100% peace deal. Dual reality: Iran opens passage, US continues blocking Iran-specific shipping.
tag_reason: 트럼프의 '봉쇄 100% 유지' 대응은 이란의 개방 선언과 결합하여 호르무즈의 이중 현실을 보여주는 신규 전개
